footer.tagline: Every day is a new quest.

hero.tagline: Track feeds, sleep, diapers, growth, and milestones with XP, quests, and a mascot parents actually love.

heroChar.title: A tracker with a face your family remembers.
heroChar.body: BabyLeveling turns everyday care into a shared story, so logging feels encouraging instead of administrative.

reasons.title: Care feels lighter
reasons.desc: Routine tracking becomes a warm little reward loop.

reasons.title: Progress is visible
reasons.desc: Parents see patterns without staring at a clinical chart.

reasons.title: Everyone joins in
reasons.desc: Partners and caregivers can share the same adventure.

reasons.title: Memories stay close
reasons.desc: Milestones become keepsakes, not just database entries.

reveal.headline: The hero is your baby. The XP is real life.
reveal.body: Every feed, every nap, every tiny milestone — it all counts. BabyLeveling turns the care you already give into a story you grow together.
reveal.payoffBody: Every level is something to celebrate, and the full feed, sleep, and growth log stays right underneath.

loop.title: The RPG loop is the care loop.
loop.body: BabyLeveling does not gamify pressure. It makes the tiny care actions easier to notice, repeat, and celebrate.

steps.title: Tap a care action
steps.desc: Feed, nap, diaper, medicine, vaccines, and growth — every log stays one thumb away.

steps.title: Earn baby XP
steps.desc: Each log adds a little XP. Consistency is gently rewarded — and a rough night never takes progress away.

steps.title: Unlock a memory
steps.desc: Milestones turn into achievements your family can revisit later.

features.title: Built like a character sheet for real life.
features.body: All the serious baby logs are still there. They are wrapped in a warmer system parents can keep coming back to.

modes.title: The joy is the wrapper. The record stays serious.
modes.chartAlt: Representative growth chart, trending steadily upward

shots.title: Tour the tiny command center.
shots.body: Big tap targets, playful progress, and parent-ready logs sit inside a phone frame large enough to inspect.
shots.scrollHint: Scroll to level up the tour

dashboard.subtitle: Today feels under control
dashboard.heading: The whole day at a glance
dashboard.body: Level, XP, streaks, and the next reminder  -  the home base you open a dozen times a day.

quest-log.subtitle: Care actions become wins
quest-log.heading: Every care moment is a quest
quest-log.body: Feeds, naps, growth, and photos  -  each tap logs the moment and hands back XP.

skill-tree.subtitle: Milestones stay visible
skill-tree.heading: Watch the milestone map branch out
skill-tree.body: First smile, first roll, first steps  -  milestones unlock as nodes you can revisit.

trophy-room.subtitle: Tiny victories stack up
trophy-room.heading: Tiny victories you get to keep
trophy-room.body: Streaks and firsts become badges the whole family gets to celebrate.

dashboard.nextLevel: Next level after two more care logs

parents.title: For tired parents, not perfect ones.
parents.body: The tone is cheerful, but the product stays practical: fast entry, shared context, and a clear record when the day gets blurry.

trust.title: Built by a parent, for parents
trust.body: I'm building BabyLeveling at 3 a.m. between feeds, for the version of me who needed it.

trust.title: Your baby's data stays yours
trust.body: Everything lives on your device. No account to start, and nothing is uploaded without your say-so.

trust.title: Join the parents already waiting
trust.body: The only number we count is how many of us are waiting for launch day.

themes.title: One warm world at launch — more moods on the way.
themes.body: BabyLeveling launches with one cozy theme. These are the moods we're crafting next — tap any one to preview how the whole page would feel.

cute.blurb: Pillowy cards, candy-coral rewards and a nurturing blush glow — the bright, cuddly world for anyone who loves warm, playful color.

focus.blurb: Restrained ink, one confident electric accent and crisp edges. The understated, premium feel that makes upgrading a no-brainer.

zen.blurb: Sage, sand and terracotta on warm paper. Low-saturation calm for parents who want tracking to feel like a deep breath.

family.title: Shared care is coming — after launch.
family.body: The app launches free and fully on your device, no account needed. Shared logging for partners and caregivers is the big feature we're building next.

faq.title: Your baby's data is yours. iOS 17+ & Apple Watch. Launching soon.

waitlist.headline: Be there at Level 1.
waitlist.body: Your adventure begins at launch. Claim your spot on the waitlist.
waitlist.successBody: We'll email you the moment the quest begins.

about.missionBody: BabyLeveling exists to make the hardest months of new parenthood feel a little less like survival — and a little more like a game you're actually winning.
about.whyBody: Every new parent we know started tracking their baby's feeding and sleep out of anxiety, not curiosity. A notebook on the nightstand. A notes app. A spreadsheet. None of it lasted past the first week. The data was there, but the habit wasn't — because there was no reward for building it. We built BabyLeveling to fix that. The XP, the levels, the achievements — they're not decoration. They're the reason you open the app at 3 a.m. instead of skipping it.
about.whatBody: BabyLeveling is a gamified baby activity tracker for iOS and Apple Watch. It tracks feeding, sleep, growth, and milestones — and turns every log into XP for a fantasy hero. The game sits on top; underneath is a serious record of the same feeds, naps, and growth, shown plainly whenever you need the facts.
about.privacyBody: All data lives on your device. Nothing is uploaded to our servers without your explicit consent. Read our full privacy policy to see exactly how we handle baby data.

contact.intro: Questions, press inquiries, partnership ideas — we read everything.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.invalid: Please enter a valid email and a message.

features.intro: BabyLeveling is a gamified baby activity tracker for iOS and Apple Watch — here's everything it tracks, and every way that tracking turns into a game.

closing.text: Curious exactly how a feed or a nap turns into XP?
See the care-to-XP system in depth
if you want the clinical side first.

featureDepth.xp-levels: Every log — a feed, a nap, a diaper change — adds XP toward your baby's next level, so progress is visible every single day, not just at milestones.
featureDepth.daily-quests: Quests reset every day, turning the same routine into a fresh, completable goal each morning instead of an open-ended chore list.
featureDepth.skill-tree: Every milestone you unlock pins to a growing map of firsts, so you can see at a glance how far your baby has come.
featureDepth.achievements: Badges stay in a permanent trophy case, so the wins from week one are still there to look back on at month twelve.
featureDepth.streaks-buffs: Streaks track consecutive days of consistent logging, with bonus XP as the reward for simply showing up.
featureDepth.apple-watch: Built for one-handed, middle-of-the-night use, so you never have to fully wake up — or unlock your phone — just to log a feed.

rpgSystem.h1: Real care. Real XP. No skin-deep gamification.
rpgSystem.intro: BabyLeveling is a parenting RPG app: every real act of care — feeding, sleep, healthy habits, milestones — maps directly to a game reward. Here's exactly how the loop works.

closing.text: Want the full RPG, not just the loop?
— nothing here replaces a rigorous tracker, it adds to one.

loopDepth.feeding: Every bottle, breastfeed, or solid-food log earns XP — the steady reward for the feeds you're already giving.
loopDepth.sleep: Naps and night sleep earn XP too, because showing up for the hard nights is exactly what the system rewards.
loopDepth.habits: Tummy time, bath time, reading — the small daily habits each add XP, the same way they add up in real development.
loopDepth.milestone: A first smile, a first roll, a first word — each pops an achievement worth a big XP burst, recorded forever in the trophy room.

parents.h1: Practical when you need it. Magical when you want it.
parents.twoModesBody: The game and the plain view read the exact same activity log — nothing is lost or swapped between them. When you need the facts, the record reads the way a pediatrician visit, or a 3 a.m. gut-check, actually needs.

closing.text: Want to see the same data as an adventure?
for more on privacy, platforms, and launch timing.

bullets: Joining the waitlist is free and always will be.
Waitlist members get launch-day access and founder perks ahead of the public release.
The final pricing model isn't set — we'll email the waitlist the moment it is, before it's public anywhere else.

closing.text: Not sure it's for you yet?
